## Purpose 
<!--- One sentence to describe the purpose of this PR, refer to any linked issues:
#14 -- this will link to issue 14
Closes #2 -- this will automatically close issue 2 on PR merge
-->
![image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/5f57e857-59fc-4c63-89be-108385848647)
The above image details the conversation surrounding the issue, as well as a recommended fix. It was determined that using "collect()" or "Array()" around t0:dt:tf is also good practice instead of just passing t0:dt:tf. Changes have been made within simulation files to make sure no errors appear when  using the new version of ClimaTimeSteppers.

title: Make syntax changes for new CTS version

body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
I realized that we were passing canopy-level stomatal resistance into a computation that was instead treating it like the leaf level stomatal resistance. Inside of this computation, we were multiplying by LAI to get to the canopy level. But that LAI factor had already been taken into account.

This removes the extra LAI factor and makes clear what is canopy vs leaf

This is where we compute the resistance that is passed to this computation: https://github.com/CliMA/ClimaLand.jl/blob/3a6e4b661ac073cbe489448840acb06f2ccec0d2/src/standalone/Vegetation/canopy_boundary_fluxes.jl#L114
